name_en: The Oversized Panda🐼 Chanel Classic Flap is stunning. The eye-catching LOGO on the body makes it instantly recognizable as Chanel. ✅ Shoulder ✅ Handheld. It holds everything. The Classic Flap is versatile, understated, timeless, lightweight, and spacious. Perfect for daily commuting. I've tested it for you! A casual Classic Flap tote is practical as a mom bag or for school. Double C LOGO is classic and durable. Very spacious with an effortless, lazy vibe! 🧺 Handbag, pink lining is sweet yet cool. Top-tier value in Chanel vintage. Super spacious and lightweight~
